---
title: "Maternal milk and infant microbiomes"
subtitle: "Exploring the role of maternal genetics on infant energy gain from milk"
image: anaerobic.jpg
image-alt: "A picture of Jess conducting research in an anaerobic chamber in the Carmody Lab at Harvard"
format: html
---

Short blurb about the research goals

[Carmody Lab](https://nme.fas.harvard.edu/index.html)

Thesis and presentation information
